hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *backend*|*frontend*) echo '{"systemMessage": "REMINDER: If you added/changed a feature, service, route, component, hook, or env var — update CLAUDE.md before finishing."}' ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
